title: Step 1: Create a New Text Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Text Object

Step 1: Create a New Text Object

	Click on the [All Tools] - the
	 [Text] button on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	You will see the mouse pointer change to the Text
	 object icon.
	Click the Text icon and drag to the image display
	 of the Vision Guide window.

	Notice that a name for the object is automatically created. In the
	 example, it is called "Text01" because this is the first Text object
	 created for this sequence.  (We will explain how to change the
	 name later.)
